text.name: settingDescription_cameraRotationEnabled
text.text: Camera trails the direction you are driving

text.name: settingDescription_rotationSpeed
text.text: How strongly the camera trails your heading

text.name: settingDescription_rotationDelay
text.text: How slowly the camera settles back behind you

text.name: settingDescription_maxRotationAngle
text.text: Limit how far the camera swings out
